title: FlowCraft Workflow Definition
description: Schema for FlowCraft visual workflow orchestration JSON format. Shared contract between frontend canvas and backend compiler.

nodes.description: Workflow nodes defining agent actions and tool calls.

id.description: Unique node identifier within the workflow.

type.description: Node type: planner (task decomposition), executor (step execution), reviewer (result evaluation), tool (MCP tool call).

tools.description: Tool names available to this node (for executor and reviewer types).

human_confirm.description: If true, reviewer node requires human approval before proceeding.

tool_name.description: Specific tool to invoke (for tool node type).

model.description: [TENTATIVE] Optional per-node LLM model override (e.g., 'gpt-4o', 'claude-3-opus'). Falls back to global config if null.

edges.description: Directed edges defining execution flow between nodes.

target.description: Target node ID. Use '__end__' to terminate execution.

expression.description: [TENTATIVE] Python lambda expression for advanced condition (executed in RestrictedPython sandbox).

loop.description: Retry loop configuration (only valid for Reviewer→Executor back-edges).
